source_name: FDA CVM Animal & Veterinary Recalls XLSX
notes: Primary source. All animal/veterinary recall types included; scope filter in Phase 2.

source_name: Data.gov FDA Pet Food Recalls XLS (legacy 2009)

notes: Broad keyword queries (dog,cat,pet,treat,chew,puppy,kitten). Deduplicated by event_id/recall_number.

source_name: UK FSA Food Alerts (Linked Data API)
notes: Full bulk download OGL v3. Scope filtering in Phase 2.

source_name: EU RASFF — Rapid Alert System for Food and Feed
notes: Access restricted: requires EU Login / iRASFF authentication.

source_name: EU RASFF Manual Export (pet food category)
notes: Manually exported from RASFF consumer portal. Category=pet food. 2019-2026.
No structured public API found. Alerts HTML-only.

source_name: French ANSES — Agence nationale de sécurité sanitaire
notes: No structured public API found. Alerts HTML/PDF only.

source_name: Canada CFIA + Consumer Product Safety recalls (JSON)
notes: Total JSON records: 33,473; saved 10,315 (CFIA + Consumer product safety). Licence: Open Government Licence - Canada v2.0 — https://open.canada.ca/en/open-government-licence-canada. Phase 2 filters to pet-food scope.
Insufficient data: RSS feed confirmed but contains only 10 most-recent items.  No bulk export or JSON API found.

source_name: New Zealand MPI Food Recalls / ACVM
notes: Inaccessible: Incapsula bot-protection returns challenge page for non-browser HTTP requests.
No public API: Drupal JSON:API disabled; no bulk export found.
